tasks.description: 1.1 Define `DiagnosticData` struct with `serde` support to capture syllable scores and buffer state.
1.2 Implement `get_diagnostic_info` FFI function in `lib.rs` to return a JSON string of internal metrics.
1.3 Refactor internal state tracking in the typing engine to expose current transformation flags.
2.1 Update `AppConfig.cs` to include the `IsDevModeEnabled` property with persistence logic.
2.2 Add `GetDiagnosticInfo` method to `EngineWrapper.cs` to fetch and deserialize JSON from Rust.
3.1 Add a "Developer Mode" toggle switch to the "System" tab in `MainWindow.xaml`.
3.2 Implement a collapsible `DiagnosticsPanel` to display syllable analytics and log data.
3.3 Set up a throttled timer in `MainWindow.xaml.cs` to refresh diagnostic data only when the panel is visible.
4.1 Verify that the Developer Mode setting persists correctly after restart.
4.2 Confirm that phonology scores update dynamically during typing in Dev Mode.
4.3 Ensure no measurable impact on keyboard hook latency when Dev Mode is disabled.

instruction:
Read context files, work through pending tasks, mark complete as you go.
Pause if you hit blockers or need clarification.
